title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 357.090 - Election of directors
text:
357.090.  Election of directors. — In the election of directors of such associations, each shareholder, regardless of the number of shares held by him or her in said association, shall have the right to cast only one vote for each director to be elected, which vote may be cast either in person or by proxy.
(RSMo 1939 § 14414, A.L. 1945 p. 77) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12756; 1919 § 10254
